question: What is the traditional weapon of the defenders of the Citadel?

answers.ground_truth: The traditional weapon of the Sky-Guardians of the Citadel is a ceremonial blade forged from 'Storm-Metal'.
answers.original: The traditional weapon of the Sky-Guardians, who defend the Citadel, is the Ceremonial Blade.
answers.perturbed: The traditional weapon of the defenders of the Citadel is their aerial combat skills.

ops.description: Xylotian Industry involves the mining of Dual-Resonance Crystals, which is a dangerous but vital activity.

entities.name: Citadel
entities.description: The Citadel is an ancient fortress built on a high mountain peak, defended by the Sky-Guardians.<SEP>The Citadel is an ancient fortress protected by the Sky-Guardians.

entities.name: Aerial Combat Skills
entities.description: Aerial Combat Skills are the specialized abilities of the Sky-Guardians in fighting airborne threats.

entities.name: Sky-Guardians
entities.description: The Sky-Guardians are elite protectors of the ancient Citadel, known for their aerial combat skills and defense against airborne threats.<SEP>The Sky-Guardians are elite protectors of the ancient Citadel, defending it from airborne threats.

relations.description: The Sky-Guardians are the elite protectors of the Citadel, defending it from airborne threats.<SEP>The Sky-Guardians are elite protectors of the ancient Citadel, defending it from airborne threats.
The Citadel is built on a high mountain peak.
The Sky-Guardians are known for their aerial combat skills in defending the Citadel.
The Sky-Guardians undergo a rigorous training process to prepare for their duties.<SEP>The Sky-Guardians undergo a rigorous training process.
The Sky-Guardians wield the Ceremonial Blade as their traditional weapon.<SEP>The Sky-Guardians wield Ceremonial Blades forged from Storm-Metal, which resonates with atmospheric energy.
